title: First snow on campus
text: First real snow today in Boston. It was beautiful, but I miss pelmeni and quiet evenings by the Kazanka river in Kazan. Feeling a bit of nostalgia.

title: CS project meeting
text: Met with my CS class group for the project. Discussed lab tasks and next steps after talking with Professor Lee.

title: Call with babushka
text: Had a long video call with my babushka in Russia. We spoke in Russian and she told stories about winter in Kazan. Homesick but happy.

title: Movie night with ISSA
text: International Student Society movie night. Met new friends and grabbed coffee after. Great social evening.

title: Thesis idea sketch
text: Sketched ideas for my thesis and an assignment. Need to email my advisor and plan lab time.
